**Is your request related to a problem?**
A clear description of what you want to achieve.

**Proposed solution**
What endpoint/method/tool would solve it?

**API Contract (if applicable)**
```yaml
# Proposed endpoint
GET /api/v1/something
# Request params
# Response shape
```
